title: Coding with ADK to beat a text adventure game
summary: Google Cloud Tech livestream featuring Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar demonstrating the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to solve a text adventure game. The stream aired on June 17 at 9:30 A.M. PDT.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech livestream, hosted by Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar, uses the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to build an agent that solves a text adventure game. The demonstration touches on agent orchestration and the spatial reasoning required to navigate a game world through text commands. It aired June 17 at 9:30 A.M. PDT.
